## SK Hynix, Nebius, and Meta highlighted together in weekly AI-themed watch list

The bundling of supply-layer (SK Hynix), infrastructure-layer (Nebius), and demand-layer (Meta) in a single watch piece reflects how the market is screening the AI stack as an integrated theme — useful as a sentiment read but requires single-name catalyst verification before positioning.

- A multi-ticker watch roundup flags SK Hynix (000660.KS), Nebius (NBIS), and Meta (META) as names to monitor.
- No specific catalysts, price direction, or financial details are provided in the headline.
- The co-grouping of HBM supply (SK Hynix), AI cloud infra (Nebius), and AI demand/model (Meta) suggests a thematic screen.
- Catalyst and directional conviction must be sourced from dedicated single-name coverage for each name.
